decision_tree.prompt: Grandmother collapses while doing dishes. Glass shatters on the floor.

options.label: Move her away from the broken glass, check responsiveness
Wait for someone to clean up the glass first

decision_tree.prompt: She is unresponsive and not breathing. Closest neighbor is across the street.

options.label: Call 911 on speaker, start CPR while talking to dispatcher

decision_tree.prompt: Dispatcher asks if there is an AED nearby. There is not.

options.label: Stop CPR and search the house
